settings.question: What exactly is DairyAssure?
settings.answer: Pure lactase enzyme powder in portable stick packs. Lactase is the enzyme your body needs to digest dairy, and we just give you more of it. One ingredient, nothing else added. Sprinkle it on your food or mix it into your drink.

settings.question: How is this different from lactase pills?
settings.answer: Pills are loaded with fillers, binders, and coatings your body doesn't need. DairyAssure is just the enzyme, nothing else. And because it's a powder you add directly to food there's no timing to worry about, you don't have to swallow anything 30 minutes before eating. Sprinkle it on and eat.

settings.question: How do I use it?
settings.answer: Tear open a stick pack and sprinkle the powder on your food or mix it into your drink right before you eat. That's it. No water needed, no pills to swallow, no planning ahead.

settings.question: Is DairyAssure safe for children?
settings.answer: Yes. It's a single-ingredient powder suitable for children, adults, and seniors. It supplements the lactase enzyme your body doesn't produce enough of. Sprinkle it on their food, it's flavorless so they won't even notice it's there.

settings.question: How long does it last?
settings.answer: 90+ minutes per dose. That's enough to get through your entire meal and then some.

settings.question: Can I use it with any dairy product?
settings.answer: Yes. Coffee, pizza, ice cream, cheese, yogurt, protein shakes. It works with all dairy and it's completely flavorless so it won't change the taste of your food.

settings.question: Is it really just one ingredient?
settings.answer: Yes. Lactase enzyme. That's the full ingredient list, you can read it in about two seconds. We think one problem needs one solution and the rest is just unnecessary filler that can actually make things worse.

settings.question: Some brands have multiple enzymes. Why does DairyAssure only have one?
settings.answer: Lactose causes the discomfort and lactase breaks it down. That's the whole equation. Other brands add extra enzymes to justify a higher price but your body only needs one thing here, pure lactase at the right dose.

settings.question: Is it worth the cost compared to generic pills?
settings.answer: About the price of a coffee per meal. Generic pills are cheaper because they're packed with binders and additives your body doesn't need, so you're comparing a pure enzyme to a cocktail of filler ingredients and hoping for the best.

settings.question: What does 'doctor recommended' mean?
settings.answer: Gastroenterologists recommend lactase enzyme supplements to patients with lactose intolerance. That's not us saying it, that's standard medical guidance. We just made the cleanest version possible so there's nothing in it a doctor would raise an eyebrow at.

settings.question: How should I store DairyAssure?
settings.answer: Store in a cool, dry place. No refrigeration needed. The stick packs are shelf-stable and designed to go wherever you go.

settings.question: Is DairyAssure gluten-free?
settings.answer: Yes. It contains only lactase enzyme so there's no gluten, dairy, soy, nuts, or common allergens in it.

settings.question: Can I take it with hot food or drinks?
settings.answer: Yes. It works with hot and cold foods and beverages. Sprinkle it into your coffee, soup, pizza, anything with dairy.

settings.question: How many stick packs should I use per meal?
settings.answer: One stick pack per meal is typically sufficient. For very dairy-heavy meals, you may use two. Everyone's sensitivity level is different, so adjust to what works best for you.

settings.question: What's the difference between Single Strength and Extra Strength?
settings.answer: Single Strength (10,000 FCC) is ideal for mild to moderate lactose sensitivity. Extra Strength (20,000 FCC) provides double the lactase enzyme for those with higher sensitivity or dairy-heavy meals.

settings.question: Do you offer subscriptions?
settings.answer: We're working on a subscribe-and-save option. Sign up for our newsletter to be the first to know when it launches.

settings.question: What's your return policy?
settings.answer: We offer a 100% money-back guarantee. If DairyAssure doesn't work for you, contact us and we'll refund every penny. No questions asked.

settings.question: Where is DairyAssure made?
settings.answer: DairyAssure is made in the USA in an FDA-registered, GMP-certified facility.
